title: SPC Signal Delay Cost Calculator
description: Calculates the financial impact of delayed detection and response to out-of-control signals in statistical process control (SPC) systems, incorporating lean and six sigma principles.

inputs.label: Process Cycle Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Average time to complete one production cycle. Used to estimate units produced per shift.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time to complete one production cycle. Used to estimate units produced per shift.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir üretim çevrimini tamamlamak için ortalama süre. Vardiya başına üretilen birimleri tahmin etmek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Zeit für einen vollständigen Produktionszyklus. Wird zur Schätzung der produzierten Einheiten pro Schicht verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps moyen pour terminer un cycle de production. Utilisé pour estimer les unités produites par quart.

inputs.label: Units per Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced in one complete cycle.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units produced in one complete cycle.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir tam çevrimde üretilen birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Einheiten, die in einem vollständigen Zyklus produziert werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités produites en un cycle complet.

inputs.label: Defect Rate When Out of Control
inputs.businessContext: Expected defect percentage when the process is out of control (based on historical SPC data).

label_i18n.en: Defect Rate When Out of Control

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected defect percentage when the process is out of control (based on historical SPC data).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proses kontrol dışıyken beklenen hata yüzdesi (geçmiş SPC verilerine dayanarak).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Fehlerprozentsatz, wenn der Prozess außer Kontrolle ist (basierend auf historischen SPC-Daten).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de défauts attendu lorsque le processus est hors contrôle (basé sur les données SPC historiques).

inputs.label: Defect Rate When In Control
inputs.businessContext: Baseline defect percentage when the process is stable and in control.

businessContext_i18n.en: Baseline defect percentage when the process is stable and in control.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proses kararlı ve kontrol altındayken temel hata yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Basis-Fehlerprozentsatz, wenn der Prozess stabil und unter Kontrolle ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de défauts de base lorsque le processus est stable et sous contrôle.

inputs.label: Cost per Defect
inputs.businessContext: Average cost incurred per defective unit (scrap, rework, warranty, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost incurred per defective unit (scrap, rework, warranty, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hatalı birim başına ortalama maliyet (fire, yeniden işleme, garanti vb.).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Kosten pro fehlerhafter Einheit (Ausschuss, Nacharbeit, Garantie usw.).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen par unité défectueuse (rebut, reprise, garantie, etc.).

inputs.label: Detection Delay (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Time from when the process goes out of control until the signal is detected (e.g., sampling interval, lab delay).

businessContext_i18n.en: Time from when the process goes out of control until the signal is detected (e.g., sampling interval, lab delay).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Prosesin kontrolden çıkması ile sinyalin tespit edilmesi arasındaki süre (örneğin, numune alma aralığı, laboratuvar gecikmesi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit vom Außerkontrollgehen des Prozesses bis zur Signalerfassung (z. B. Probenahmeintervall, Laborverzögerung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps entre le moment où le processus devient hors contrôle et la détection du signal (ex. intervalle d'échantillonnage, délai laboratoire).

inputs.label: Response Delay (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Time from detection until corrective action is implemented (e.g., root cause analysis, adjustment).

businessContext_i18n.en: Time from detection until corrective action is implemented (e.g., root cause analysis, adjustment).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tespitten düzeltici faaliyetin uygulanmasına kadar geçen süre (örneğin, kök neden analizi, ayarlama).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit von der Erkennung bis zur Umsetzung von Korrekturmaßnahmen (z. B. Ursachenanalyse, Anpassung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps entre la détection et la mise en œuvre de l'action corrective (ex. analyse des causes racines, ajustement).

inputs.label: Shift Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of production hours per shift. Used to calculate daily production volume.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of production hours per shift. Used to calculate daily production volume.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vardiya başına üretim saati sayısı. Günlük üretim hacmini hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Produktionsstunden pro Schicht. Wird zur Berechnung des täglichen Produktionsvolumens verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'heures de production par quart. Utilisé pour calculer le volume de production quotidien.

rules.message: Out-of-control defect rate must be greater than in-control defect rate.
Detection and response delays cannot be negative.
Hidden loss multiplier must be at least 1.0 when hidden losses are included.

thresholds.message: Delay cost per event exceeds $10,000. Immediate process improvement recommended.
Out-of-control defect rate exceeds 10%. Review process capability and control limits.
Low signal frequency may indicate insufficient sampling or insensitive control limits.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
